summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 2 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs:59 — Assert `exitCode === 2` (not just non-zero) to lock in the distinct exit-code contract from SPEC.md Technical Approach.
🟡 test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs:79 — Add assertion that `STATE.json`/task list was not created, matching SPEC acceptance bullet "exit code 2, no STATE.json task list created".

No 🔴 or 🟡. The implementation is minimal: ~12-line diff replacing silent auto-stub with explicit failure (print → notify → `exit(2)`). Veto categories all clean — `buildMinimalSpec` is not orphaned (still used at `bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:740`), no new abstraction, no indirection, no gold-plating. Comment at `run.mjs:932` correctly documents intent (non-obvious "why").
